title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 11 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 11 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 11 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 11/04/2022
Apr 11th, 2022 CFR Qingdao, USD/dry tonne DCE iron ore futures market falling sharply trends，an decrease of 4.56% throughout the day;the main contract 2209 closed 868.5. the quotation in the morning was decreased by 20-30 yuan/mt from last Friday. some traders quotation is still weaker.
